### Tickets by Status

The number of open PSOM Jira tickets grouped by their current workflow status,
based on the latest weekly snapshot.

*Alternative names*:

- ticket status breakdown
- open tickets by status
- PSOM ticket status distribution

**Calculation.** Filter to the most recent `date` partition and count tickets by
`status`.

::: {.panel-tabset}

## SQL

```sql
SELECT
    status,
    COUNT(*) AS ticket_count
FROM jira.psom
WHERE date = (SELECT MAX(date) FROM jira.psom)
GROUP BY status
ORDER BY ticket_count DESC;
```

## R

```r
psom <- tbl(con, in_schema("jira", "psom"))
latest_date <- psom |> summarise(d = max(date, na.rm = TRUE)) |> pull(d)

psom |>
  filter(date == local(latest_date)) |>
  count(status, name = "ticket_count") |>
  arrange(desc(ticket_count))
```

:::
